rationale.R1.2: The critique identifies multiple inconsistencies and provides detailed fixes, showing thorough analysis.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is disclosed for prior work but not comprehensively across all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: Suggestions prevent harm by avoiding misleading claims and ensuring accuracy.
rationale.RX.5: Lack of annotations for changes except minor edits.
